name: Speed Jiru
desc: The 14th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Marigold
desc: Member of the Kuja Pirates, the younger sister of three Gorgon sisters

name: Kingdew
desc: The 11th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Islewan
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Karma
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Sandersonia
desc: Member of the Kuja Pirates, one of the three Gorgon sisters

name: Namur
desc: The 8th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Doma
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Shanks
desc: Luffy's most respected man, one of the Yonko. He's a very easy-going and broad-minded man, doesn't seem to mind what happens to himself. However he would never forgive anyone for attacking his friend.

name: Basil Ringrose
desc: Famous pirate in the South Sea

name: Delacuaji
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Haruta
desc: The 12th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Vista
desc: The 5th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Chopper
desc: Doctor of the Straw Hat Pirates, user of Human-Human Fruit. He's been studying medicine with Dr. Kureha on Drum Island and dreams of finding a medicine that can heal every illness.

name: Epoida
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Kaku
desc: Member of CP9 with a power level of 2200 and user of the Ox-Ox Fruit Giraffe Model. He's a proficient swordsman and an expert in Rankyaku. Therefore he calls himself "Four Swords Style".

name: Cricket
desc: Boss of Saruyama Alliance and distant descendant of Montblanc Noland.

name: William Cowley
desc: Famous pirate in the South Sea

name: Ohm
desc: The priest in charge of the "Ordeal of Iron", which has a 0% survival rate. Symbolizing "sadness", he's adept at using "Iron Cloud".

name: Amadob
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Diamond Jozu
desc: The 3rd division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates, user of Diamond devil fruit, can resist all physical attacks. He once blocked the strongest slash in the world from Dracule Mihawk. His attack effect are fast, strong, powerful. He is also a user of Armament Haki.

name: Fossa
desc: The 15th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Decalvan Brothers
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Cricket
desc: Boss of Saruyama Alliance and distant descendant of Montblanc Noland.

name: Bizarre
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Ohm
desc: The priest in charge of the "Ordeal of Iron", which has a 0% survival rate. Symbolizing "sadness", he's adept at using "Iron Cloud".

name: Kaku
desc: Member of CP9 with a power level of 2200 and user of the Ox-Ox Fruit Giraffe Model. He's a proficient swordsman and an expert in Rankyaku. Therefore he calls himself "Four Swords Style".

name: Shirahoshi
desc: Princess of King Neptune in Fishman Island and mermaid princess who can communicate with Sea Kings and have a great power that can either save lives or destroy the world. She's honest, innocent, tough though in a fragile look.

name: Law
desc: Law is the captain of the Heart Pirates from North Blue and nicknamed "the Surgeon of Death". Being one of The Eleven Supernovas, he is the user of a Devil Fruit called the Ope Ope no Mi, which allows him to displace anything in the  a spherical territory that he creates.

name: Hawkins
desc: One of "The Eleven Supernovas", captain of the Hawkins Pirates. His Devil Fruit enables him to redirect any instances of physical damage inflicted upon him to another person using straw voodoo dolls, leaving him unharmed

name: Arlong
desc: Captain of the Arlong Pirates, uses  Shark Saw as his weapon. He thinks money is the best friend,and considers humans to be inferior beings.

name: Foxy
desc: Captain of the Foxy Pirates, also known as the Silver Fox, user of Slow-Slow Fruit, with a bounty of 24,000,000 Beli. He uses Davy Back Fight to merge other pirates and has 920 straight victories in DBF.

name: Ace
desc: Luffy's brother, son of the Pirate KingGol D. Roger. He's also the 2nd division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates and owns enormous power.

name: Mihawk
desc: A member of the Shichibukai and the current holder of the title, "Greatest Swordsman in the World". He is a very serious man and possesses great swordsmanship. He can deflect the course of bullets by wielding the sword.

name: Franky
desc: Shipwright for the Straw Hat Pirates, formerleader of the Franky Family, a group of ship dismantlers. He's the apprentice of the legendary shipwright Tom and also a skillful shipwright himself.

name: Doflamingo
desc: A "Shichibukai". With the Shichibukai's privileges endowed by the World Government, Doflamingo controls many industries in the world.  He is a blond-haired man with the sunglass and pink feather coat.

name: MaGuy
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Gin
desc: Combat leader of the Krieg Pirates. His weapon is a pair of tonfa tipped with heavy iron balls the size of cannonballs.

name: Enel
desc: God of Skypiea, user of Rumble-Rumble Fruit. He's a crule ruler and doesn't care anyone else except himself. He destroyed his homeland Bilka, then he and his loyal contingent of followers became the rule of Skypiea.

name: Mr.1
desc: Daz Bones, alias Mr.1, user of Dice-Dice Fruit. He has the archaic Japanese symbol of the number 1 tattooed on his torso.

name: Mr.2
desc: Bentham, alias Mr. 2, user of Clone-Clone Fruit. He can turn into anyone he  has touched with his right hand.

name: Tashigi
desc: Marine serving under Smoker the White Hunter. She looks remarkably like Zoro's deceased friend Kuina.

name: Rob Lucci
desc: The strongest member of the CP9(with 4000 power level). He has black wavy hair, never display any emotions. He claims to server a Dark Justice which gives him a reason to kill people legitimately.

name: Robin
desc: Archaeologist of the Straw Hat Pirates, user of Hana-Hana Fruit. Her dream is to find the Rio Poneglyph which tells the True History. To her, there is nothing worse than destroying objects of historical significance.

name: Burgess
desc: Blackbeard Pirates' helmsman who uses a pistol as his weapon. He's strong enough to lift a house.

name: Moriah
desc: Moriah was a member of the Shichibukai who resided on the ship Thriller Bark. As the user of the Shadow-Shadow Fruit, he owns the ability to steal other's shadows.

name: Moriah
desc: Moriah was a member of the Shichibukai who resided on the ship Thriller Bark. As the user of the Shadow-Shadow Fruit, he owns the ability to steal other's shadows.

name: Franky
desc: Shipwright for the Straw Hat Pirates, formerleader of the Franky Family, a group of ship dismantlers. He's the apprentice of the legendary shipwright Tom and also a skillful shipwright himself.

name: Doc Q
desc: Blackbeard Pirates' doctor who uses a scythe and explosive apples as his weapons. He always pretends as if he is dying. So does his horse.

name: Satori
desc: The priest in charge of the "Ordeal of Balls", which has a 10% survival rate. Symbolizing "joy", he's adept at using "Impact Dial" and "Surprise Ball" "

desc: A “Shichibukai” and captain of Fishman Pirates. With the great strength to destroy a whole pirate group with one strike, he's adept at "Fishman Karate" and "Fishman Judo".

name: Smoker
desc: Marine Captain, aiming at catching Luffy. User of Logia type Devil Fruit, Smoke-Smoke Fruit.

name: Doflamingo
desc: A "Shichibukai". With the Shichibukai's privileges endowed by the World Government, Doflamingo controls many industries in the world.  He is a blond-haired man with the sunglass and pink feather coat.

name: Kuma
desc: A "Shichibukai" and former revolutionary commander. Nicknamed "tyrant", he's a Paramecia-class Devil Fruit user who can push everything.

name: Gedatsu
desc: The priest in charge of the "Ordeal of Swamp", which has a 50% survival rate. Symbolizing "happiness", he's adept at using "Jet Dial" and "Swamp Cloud".

name: Vivi
desc: princess of Alabast. She loves peace and has a high sense of responsibility. But sometimes she may do some ignorant things.

name: Magellan
desc: The strongest man in Impel Down. Magellan is a large man, wears bat wings and horn-like ornaments on his head, the latter of which he can pull out and use as weapons.

name: Perona
desc: Perona is one of  Shichibukai member Gecko Moria's cadres and also the Commander of Wild Zombies and Surprise Zombies. She looks like a adorable princess but actually is very boyish.

name: Chopper
desc: Doctor of the Straw Hat Pirates, user of Human-Human Fruit. He's been studying medicine with Dr. Kureha on Drum Island and dreams of finding a medicine that can heal every illness.

name: Vivi
desc: princess of Alabast. She loves peace and has a high sense of responsibility. But sometimes she may do some ignorant things.

name: John Eaton
desc: Famous pirate in the South Sea

name: Lafitte
desc: Blackbeard Pirates' navigator. He can fly with the wings on his back.

desc: Marine Captain, aiming at catching Luffy. User of Logia type Devil Fruit, Smoke-Smoke Fruit.

desc: The priest in charge of the "Ordeal of Swamp", which has a 50% survival rate. Symbolizing "happiness", he's adept at using "Jet Dial" and "Swamp Cloud".

desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Curiel
desc: The 10th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Lafitte
desc: Blackbeard Pirates' navigator. He can fly with the wings on his back.

name: Hancock
desc: The only female member of the Shichibukai, also known as Pirate Empress. She rules over the Kuja tribe which locates in the Amazon Lily.

name: Bellamy
desc: Captain of the Bellamy Pirates. Blond hair and a long scar above the left eye, he's arrogant and thinks that pirates with dreams are stupid.

name: Crocodile
desc: President of the secret criminal organization, Baroque Works, alias MR.0. User of Sand-Sand Fruit which grands him the ability of controlling sand freely and turning into sand reflexively.

name: Mr.5
desc: True name is not revealed. User of the Bomb-Bomb Fruit, he can turn his body parts into a bomb.

name: Akainu
desc: One of the marine three Admirals, user of Magma-Magma Fruit. He can attack opponents with  magma as well as volcano bullet. Akainu is an adamant believer in Absolute Justice, and is ruthless in his maintenance of it.

name: Van Augur
desc: Blackbeard Pirates' sniper who uses the rifle named Senriku to hunt down his target. He even can hit a target miles away without being noticed.

name: Alvida
desc: She ate  Slip-Slip Fruit not long after being defeated by Luffy and has transformed greatly. All things will slip off her skin.

name: Shura
desc: The priest in charge of the "Ordeal of String", which has a 3% survival rate. Symbolizing "fury", he's adept at using "Heat Dial" and "String Cloud".

name: Law
desc: Law is the captain of the Heart Pirates from North Blue and nicknamed "the Surgeon of Death". Being one of The Eleven Supernovas, he is the user of a Devil Fruit called the Ope Ope no Mi, which allows him to displace anything in the  a spherical territory that he creates.

name: Kizaru
desc: One of the marine three Admirals, user of Glint-Glint Fruit. He can move at the speed of light and transport him/herself by means of reflection.

name: Aokiji
desc: One of the three Marine admirals and user of the Ice-Ice Fruit, which allows the user to control ice at will. Aokiji is a very tall man and likes to sleep while standing. He always knows right from wrong and takes a firm stand. The motto he uses to describe himself is 'Lazy Justice'.

name: Kidd
desc: One of the 11 Supernovas, leader of the Kidd Pirates, ambitious yet brutal, worth a bounty of 470000K

name: Krieg
desc: Krieg is considered the most powerful pirate in the East Blue, also claimed to be the strongest man in the world. He is confident in his own superiority and is equipped with lots of weapons.

name: Blackbeard
desc: Commonly refered to as Blakbeard, leader of the Blackbeard Pirates. Owner of Dark-Dark Fruit. He's replaced Whitebeard to become one of the Yonko.

name: Waffle
desc: Famous pirate in the South Sea

name: Tashigi
desc: Marine serving under Smoker the White Hunter. She looks remarkably like Zoro's deceased friend Kuina.

name: Alvida
desc: Captain of the Alvida Pirates and the first enemy encountered by Luffy. Her weapon is called the Iron Mace.

name: Ramba
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Rob Lucci
desc: The strongest member of the CP9(with 4000 power level). He has black wavy hair, never display any emotions. He claims to server a Dark Justice which gives him a reason to kill people legitimately.

name: Kuma
desc: A "Shichibukai" and former revolutionary commander. Nicknamed "tyrant", he's a Paramecia-class Devil Fruit user who can push everything.

name: Jinbe
desc: A “Shichibukai” and captain of Fishman Pirates. With the great strength to destroy a whole pirate group with one strike, he's adept at "Fishman Karate" and "Fishman Judo".

name: Mohji
desc: The first mate of the Buggy Pirates, uses  He is a pet tamer, usually accompanied by his pet lion Richie, very skilled with a whip.

name: Cabaji
desc: Second mate of the Buggy Pirates. He has a unqie hairstyle that covers half of his face and wears a scarf that covers the lower portion of his face. Cabaji fights with a combination of swordplay and acrobatics, rides a unicycle and likes to use various props to attack.

name: Morgan
desc: Captain of Marine 153 branch. Corrupted by his power, Morgan abuses his power to rule Shells Town.

name: Monte Bass
desc: Famous pirate in the South Sea

name: Coconut
desc: Growing up with the protagonist in Windmill Village.

name: Burgess
desc: Blackbeard Pirates' helmsman who uses a pistol as his weapon. He's strong enough to lift a house.

name: Buggy
desc: The captain of the Buggy Pirates, former apprentice of the Roger Pirates. He knows Shanks for a long time and hates people mentioning his red nose.

name: Hatchan
desc: Octopus fishman, officer of the Arlong Pirates. He's an accomplished swordsman that can use six swords together.

name: X Drake
desc: One of "The Eleven Supernovas". X Drake is a former Marine rear admiral from North Blue,  and later has become a pirate and captain of the Drake Pirates. He possesses what is referred to as a "rare, Ancient Zoan Devil Fruit", giving Drake the ability to transform into a theropoda dinosaur.

name: Kuroobi
desc: Officer of the Arlong Pirates. He is a level 40 practitioner of Fishman Karate. Ordinary people will definitely die if fighting against him in the water.

name: Buchi
desc: Protectors of the Black Cat ship. He can use Cat Stomp to take a flying leap into the air and stomps on his opponent.

name: Rene
desc: A young girl who's looking for her father. She's a highly skilled swordsman and is good at using sword to block attacks.

name: Gin
desc: Combat leader of the Krieg Pirates. His weapon is a pair of tonfa tipped with heavy iron balls the size of cannonballs.

name: Mr.2
desc: Bentham, alias Mr. 2, user of Clone-Clone Fruit. He can turn into anyone he  has touched with his right hand.

name: Kohza
desc: The leader of the Alabasta Rebellion. Vivi's childhood friend and childhood leader of the Suna Suna Clan. He's a blond man that wears glasses .

name: Buggy
desc: The captain of the Buggy Pirates, former apprentice of the Roger Pirates. He knows Shanks for a long time and hates people mentioning his red nose.

name: Mr.1
desc: Daz Bones, alias Mr.1, user of Dice-Dice Fruit. He has the archaic Japanese symbol of the number 1 tattooed on his torso.

name: Dalton
desc: The king of Sakura Kingdom, user of Ox-Ox Fruit Bison Model. He possesses great strength of a bison.

name: MR.3
desc: Galdino, alias Mr.3, user of Wax-Wax Fruit. He likes to make enemies into candle toy .

name: A.O
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Masira
desc: Head of a simian salvage operation. Masira is a human with ape-like features, he has amazing lung capacity and strength which is powerful enough to beat a giant eel.

name: Helmeppo
desc: Captain Morgan's son. Once a spoiled child who took advantage of his father's status, he is now a Marine chief petty officer.

name: Sham
desc: One of the lookouts of the Black Cat pirates. He can quickly steals a piece of the opponents equipment by using Cat Snatch.

name: Atmos
desc: The 13th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Enel
desc: God of Skypiea, user of Rumble-Rumble Fruit. He's a crule ruler and doesn't care anyone else except himself. He destroyed his homeland Bilka, then he and his loyal contingent of followers became the rule of Skypiea.

name: Blamenco
desc: The 6th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Arlong
desc: Captain of the Arlong Pirates, uses  Shark Saw as his weapon. He thinks money is the best friend,and considers humans to be inferior beings.

name: Palms
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Robin
desc: Archaeologist of the Straw Hat Pirates, user of Hana-Hana Fruit. Her dream is to find the Rio Poneglyph which tells the True History. To her, there is nothing worse than destroying objects of historical significance.

name: Nami
desc: Navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates. She's a thighly skilled navigator as well as a talented cartographer. Her dream is to draw a complete map of the world.

name: Kuro
desc: Known as Kuro of a Hundred Plans. He sets up an elaborate scheme to take Kaya's property because he's tired of living like a pirate captain.

name: Accino
desc: Patriarch of the Accino Family, user of Heat Heat Fruit. He can produce vast amounts of heat from his body.  With this ability, he's able to stand in lava without suffering any injuries,

name: John Cook
desc: Famous pirate in the South Sea

name: Mihawk
desc: A member of the Shichibukai and the current holder of the title, "Greatest Swordsman in the World". He is a very serious man and possesses great swordsmanship. He can deflect the course of bullets by wielding the sword.

name: Ace
desc: Luffy's brother, son of the Pirate KingGol D. Roger. He's also the 2nd division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates and owns enormous power.

name: Charles Swan
desc: Famous pirate in the South Sea

name: Alvida
desc: She ate  Slip-Slip Fruit not long after being defeated by Luffy and has transformed greatly. All things will slip off her skin.

name: Squard
desc: Captain of the Maelstrom Spider Pirates

name: Magellan
desc: The strongest man in Impel Down. Magellan is a large man, wears bat wings and horn-like ornaments on his head, the latter of which he can pull out and use as weapons.

name: Rakuyo
desc: The 7th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Brook
desc: The musician of the Straw Hat Pirates, user of Revive-Revive Fruit. He loves music and can play a variety of instrument. His dream is to meet up with Laboon again at Twin Capes after travel around the world.

name: Izo
desc: The 16th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Crocodile
desc: President of the secret criminal organization, Baroque Works, alias MR.0. User of Sand-Sand Fruit which grands him the ability of controlling sand freely and turning into sand reflexively.

name: Elmy
desc: Pirate captain, ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Luffy
desc: Captain of the Straw Hat Pirates. Becomes a pirate due to a promise with Shanks in his childhood. His dream is to find the legendary One Piece and become teh Pirate king.

name: Van Augur
desc: Blackbeard Pirates' sniper who uses the rifle named Senriku to hunt down his target. He even can hit a target miles away without being noticed.

name: Zoro
desc: Swordsman of the Straw Hat Pirates, aiming to become the world's greatest swordsman. He was saved by Luffy during an incident with the Marines. He's considered to be the second strongest man in the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Shura
desc: The priest in charge of the "Ordeal of String", which has a 3% survival rate. Symbolizing "fury", he's adept at using "Heat Dial" and "String Cloud".

name: Hancock
desc: The only female member of the Shichibukai, also known as Pirate Empress. She rules over the Kuja tribe which locates in the Amazon Lily.

name: John Reed
desc: Famous pirate in the South Sea

name: Usopp
desc: Sniper of the Straw Hat Pirates. He's easily frightened and likes to brag himself. However, he has a dream of becoming a "Brave warrior of the sea" and as strong as his father.

name: Blackbeard
desc: Commonly refered to as Blakbeard, leader of the Blackbeard Pirates. Owner of Dark-Dark Fruit. He's replaced Whitebeard to become one of the Yonko.

name: Sanji
desc: Chef of the Straw Hat Pirates. He worked for Red-Leg Zeff when he was a child and later joined the Straw Hat Pirates in order to fulfill his dream of finding the All Blue which is the resource of world's all seafood ingredients.

name: Blenheim
desc: The 9th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Oars Jr.
desc: pirate captain who is the descendant of Oars and an ally of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Shoujou
desc: Masira's brother, captain of the Shoujou Pirates. He's a human who looks like a orangutan.

name: Chew
desc: Chew has thick lips, he can spit a shot of water from his mouth to attack enemies. He's easy to be irritated and always lack patience.

name: Wapol
desc: The former monarch of the Drum Kingdom. He's a selfish king who has not even the slightest regard for his people.

name: Krieg
desc: Krieg is considered the most powerful pirate in the East Blue, also claimed to be the strongest man in the world. He is confident in his own superiority and is equipped with lots of weapons.

name: Jango
desc: The first mate of Black Cat Pirates, also a hypnotist. His weapon pendulum  can be used for hypnotizing.

name: Bala
desc: Commander of the Krieg Pirates' second unit. His body is covered with iron plates. He'll get mad if he finds himself bleeding and all the irons will be on fire.
